title: Resource Graphs, Cache Evidence, Budgets, and Performance Non-Claims · Go Semantics Case: Size Dimensions
summary: The tool reports document bytes as total page weight, ignores encoded versus decoded sizes and browser discovery, and turns one server timing into user performance. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go size dimensions increment in static resource and delivery evidence dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Predict Size Dimensions · Theory Size Dimensions
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go team handles case 7592 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. checks.description: The cumulative go portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: crawler-go-size-dimensions-7ihuc4.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: crawler-go-size-dimensions-7ihuc4(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_crawler_go_size_dimensions_7ihuc4\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?resourceCases < 18)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?accountedResources < 17 \|\| accountedResources > resourceCases)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?budgetChanges < 5)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?fieldClaims > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.
